Release Rust projects with ease

## Global Flags

| Flag | Short | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `--config` | `-f` | Path to config file (overrides auto-detection) |
| `--verbose` | тАФ | Enable verbose output |
| `--debug` | тАФ | Enable debug output |
| `--quiet` | `-q` | Suppress non-error output |
| `--strict` | тАФ | Strict mode: configured features that silently skip become hard errors |


## Commands


### `anodizer release`

Run the full release pipeline


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--crate` | тАФ | тАФ | Release a specific crate (repeatable; --id is accepted as a GoReleaser-compat alias) |
| `--all` | тАФ | тАФ | Release all crates with unreleased changes |
| `--force` | тАФ | тАФ | Force release even without unreleased changes |
| `--snapshot` | тАФ | тАФ | Build without publishing (snapshot mode) |
| `--nightly` | тАФ | тАФ | Create a nightly release with date-based version |
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--clean` | тАФ | тАФ | Remove dist directory before starting |
| `--skip` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip stages (comma-separated, e.g. docker,announce) |
| `--token` | тАФ | тАФ | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |
| `--timeout` | тАФ | `60m` | Pipeline timeout duration (e.g., 60m, 1h, 5s) |
| `--parallelism` | `-p` | тАФ | Maximum number of parallel build jobs (default: number of CPUs) |
| `--auto-snapshot` | тАФ | тАФ | Automatically set --snapshot if the git repo is dirty |
| `--single-target` | тАФ | тАФ | Build only for the host target triple |
| `--targets` | тАФ | тАФ | Restrict the build to a comma-separated subset of configured target triples (e.g. x86_64-apple-darwin,aarch64-apple-darwin). Used by the Determinism Harness's sharded job matrix; conflicts with --single-target. |
| `--host-targets` | тАФ | тАФ | Build every configured target this host can build, skipping cross-compile-only targets (apple targets on a non-macOS host). Only valid with --snapshot or --dry-run. Used by `task prepush` to do a real host-scoped build without aborting on un-buildable targets. |
| `--release-notes` | тАФ | тАФ | Path to a custom release notes file (overrides changelog) |
| `--workspace` | тАФ | тАФ | Release a specific workspace in a monorepo config |
| `--preflight` | тАФ | тАФ | Run pre-flight publisher-state check and exit (don't start the pipeline) |
| `--no-preflight` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip the automatic pre-flight publisher-state check |
| `--strict-preflight` | тАФ | тАФ | Alias for --strict (also treats Unknown publisher state as a blocker during pre-flight) |
| `--draft` | тАФ | тАФ | Set the release as a draft |
| `--release-header` | тАФ | тАФ | Path to a file containing custom release header text |
| `--release-header-tmpl` | тАФ | тАФ | Path to a template file for release header (rendered with template variables) |
| `--release-footer` | тАФ | тАФ | Path to a file containing custom release footer text |
| `--release-footer-tmpl` | тАФ | тАФ | Path to a template file for release footer (rendered with template variables) |
| `--release-notes-tmpl` | тАФ | тАФ | Path to a template file for release notes (rendered with template variables, overrides --release-notes) |
| `--fail-fast` | тАФ | тАФ | Abort immediately on first error during publishing |
| `--no-gate-submitter` | тАФ | тАФ | Disable the Submitter gate: dispatch Submitter publishers even when required Assets/Manager publishers failed |
| `--rollback` | тАФ | тАФ | Rollback policy after publish stage. Defaults to best-effort when preflight is clean, none otherwise. |
| `--rollback-only` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip publish; re-attempt rollback from a prior run report. Requires --from-run=<id>. |
| `--from-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Prior run id whose state to load when running --rollback-only. Loads <dist>/run-<id>/rollback.json if present (a prior replay's state), otherwise <dist>/run-<id>/report.json. Delete rollback.json to force a full re-roll. Must match the run_id format written by the release pipeline (alphanumeric, dot, dash, underscore; no path separators). |
| `--allow-rerun` | тАФ | тАФ | DANGEROUS: force publish to proceed even when a prior dist/run-<id>/report.json exists for this tag. PR-based publishers (homebrew, scoop, nix, krew, MCP) will open DUPLICATE pull requests. Recover from partial failures with --rollback-only --from-run=<id> first. Cannot be combined with --rollback-only (which has its own idempotency). |
| `--allow-nondeterministic` | тАФ | тАФ | Runtime non-determinism opt-out for a specific artifact (repeatable). Mutually exclusive with --strict. |
| `--summary-json` | тАФ | тАФ | Write the per-publisher run summary JSON to this path. Without it, real (non-snapshot, non-dry-run) releases write <dist>/run-<id>/summary.json тАФ even when a stage fails тАФ so recovery tooling always has machine-readable publish state. |
| `--allow-ai-failure` | тАФ | тАФ | If `changelog.ai` is configured and the AI provider fails, log a warning and keep the pre-AI release notes instead of aborting the release. |
| `--split` | тАФ | тАФ | Run only the build stage for split CI fan-out (outputs artifacts JSON to dist/) |
| `--merge` | тАФ | тАФ | Merge artifacts from split build jobs and resume the pipeline from post-build stages |
| `--publish-only` | тАФ | тАФ | Load artifacts from dist/ (preserved by `anodize check determinism --preserve-dist`) and run only the sign + publish pipeline. Skips build/archive/nfpm/sbom/checksum тАФ those stages' outputs must already be present in dist/. |
| `--prepare` | тАФ | тАФ | Run local build + archive + sign + checksum + sbom stages but skip release / publish / announce (GoReleaser Pro parity). Artifacts stay in dist/ for inspection. `--prepare-only` is accepted as an alias for GR-imported scripts. |
| `--announce-only` | тАФ | тАФ | Re-fire announcers only. Loads `<dist>/run-<id>/report.json` written by a prior run, skips every pipeline stage except announce (which itself short-circuits on nightly), then runs after-hooks. Use this to retry a transient announcer failure (Slack 502, Discord 5xx) without re-creating the GitHub release or re-publishing to package managers. Fails fast when no `<dist>/run-<id>/report.json` is present. |
| `--resume-release` | тАФ | тАФ | Resume into an existing release left over from a prior failed attempt; bypasses the safety check that bails on partial assets. |
| `--replace-existing` | тАФ | тАФ | Force release.replace_existing_artifacts: true regardless of config (overwrite conflicting assets on retry). |
| `--no-post-publish-poll` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip post-publish polling for chocolatey moderation / winget PR validation; report NotPolled for affected publishers. |


### `anodizer build`

Build binaries only (always runs in snapshot mode)


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--crate` | тАФ | тАФ | Build a specific crate (repeatable) |
| `--timeout` | тАФ | `60m` | Pipeline timeout duration (e.g., 60m, 1h, 5s) |
| `--parallelism` | `-p` | тАФ | Maximum number of parallel build jobs (default: number of CPUs) |
| `--single-target` | тАФ | тАФ | Build only for the host target triple |
| `--workspace` | тАФ | тАФ | Build a specific workspace in a monorepo config |
| `--output` | `-o` | тАФ | Copy the built binary to this path (requires --single-target and single crate) |
| `--skip` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip stages (comma-separated: pre-hooks, post-hooks, validate, before) |


### `anodizer check`

Validate configuration and run determinism checks


### `anodizer check config`

Validate the workspace's anodize config


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--workspace` | тАФ | тАФ | Validate a specific workspace in a monorepo config |


### `anodizer check determinism`

Run the determinism harness (build pipeline twice, diff artifacts)


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--runs` | тАФ | `2` | Number of from-clean rebuilds to diff |
| `--stages` | тАФ | тАФ | Optional stage subset (build,archive,sbom,sign,checksum,cargo-package,docker). `cargo-package` is harness-only тАФ drives `cargo package --no-verify --allow-dirty` per workspace member to probe `.crate` byte-stability without hitting a registry. `docker` is harness-only тАФ drives `docker buildx build --output=type=oci,rewrite-timestamp=true,dest=тАж` against `<repo>/Dockerfile` to probe OCI image byte-stability without pushing to a registry; skipped when `docker buildx` is unavailable or no Dockerfile exists. |
| `--targets` | тАФ | тАФ | Restrict the harness to a comma-separated subset of configured target triples. Used by the sharded release workflow so each runner only validates targets it can natively build (Linux runner skips macOS targets, etc.). Forwarded to the child `anodize release --snapshot` subprocess. |
| `--report` | тАФ | тАФ | JSON report path; default dist/run-<id>/determinism.json |
| `--snapshot` | тАФ | тАФ | Force snapshot mode on the child release subprocess (artifacts get a `-SNAPSHOT-<sha>` suffix). Default: auto тАФ snapshot off when HEAD is at a tag, on otherwise. |
| `--no-snapshot` | тАФ | тАФ | Force snapshot mode OFF on the child release subprocess (artifacts emit the actual release version). Default: auto тАФ see --snapshot. |
| `--preserve-dist` | тАФ | тАФ | When the harness greens, copy run-0's `<worktree>/dist/**` to <path> and emit `<path>/context.json` describing the artifact set. The release workflow's publish-only path consumes this to ship the determinism step's output directly (eliminates the redundant `build:` recompilation). Local operators can pass this too тАФ useful for inspecting a hermetic dist tree without re-running the release pipeline. |
| `--crate` | тАФ | тАФ | When --preserve-dist is set, write the preserved dist tree to <dest>/<name>/ instead of directly into <dest>/. Used by the sharded matrix to produce per-crate subdirectories so a `release --publish-only` job can merge all crates into a single dist/ without context.json collision. |


### `anodizer check version-files`

Check that enrolled `version_files` still match each crate's current version


### `anodizer init`

Generate starter config, or enroll version-bearing files


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--version-files` | тАФ | тАФ | Discover repo files that embed the current version and enroll the selection into version_files in .anodizer.yaml |
| `--exclude` | тАФ | тАФ | Glob(s) to drop from discovered candidates (repeatable or comma-separated); only with --version-files |
| `--yes` | `-y` | тАФ | Non-interactive: enroll all discovered candidates without prompting |


### `anodizer changelog`

Manage CHANGELOG.md: refresh the pending section, or render notes/JSON


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<range>` | тАФ | тАФ | Commit range to render: a single tag (predecessor-resolved against its crate), an explicit `from..to` range, or omitted to refresh each crate's pending section against its last tag |
| `--format` | тАФ | `keep-a-changelog` | Output format: keep-a-changelog (refresh the [Unreleased] section), release-notes (grouped-bullet GitHub body to stdout), or json |
| `--write` | тАФ | тАФ | Apply the regenerated [Unreleased] section to the configured CHANGELOG.md file(s) in place (keep-a-changelog only) |
| `--crate` | тАФ | тАФ | Restrict to a specific crate in a workspace |
| `--snapshot` | тАФ | тАФ | Preview as a snapshot release (release-notes format only) |


### `anodizer completion`

Generate shell completions


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<shell>` | тАФ | тАФ | Shell to generate completions for |


### `anodizer healthcheck`

Check availability of required external tools


### `anodizer man`

Generate man pages to stdout


### `anodizer jsonschema`

Output JSON Schema for .anodizer.yaml


### `anodizer resolve-tag`

Resolve a git tag to its matching crate in the config


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<tag>` | тАФ | тАФ | Tag to resolve (e.g. 'v1.2.3', 'core-v0.2.3') |
| `--json` | тАФ | тАФ | Output as JSON |


### `anodizer targets`

Emit the configured build targets as a GitHub Actions matrix


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--json` | тАФ | тАФ | Output as JSON (include-form matrix) |
| `--crate` | тАФ | тАФ | Restrict to specific crate(s) |


### `anodizer tag`

Auto-tag based on commit message directives


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Show what tag would be created without pushing |
| `--custom-tag` | тАФ | тАФ | Override bump logic with a specific tag value |
| `--version` | тАФ | тАФ | Tag exactly this semver version, bypassing autotag derivation and the Cargo.toml-ahead guard |
| `--default-bump` | тАФ | тАФ | Override default bump type (patch/minor/major) |
| `--crate` | тАФ | тАФ | Tag a specific crate in a workspace |
| `--push` | тАФ | тАФ | Push the version-sync bump commit to the release branch atomically with the tag |
| `--no-push` | тАФ | тАФ | Push the tag only, leaving the version-sync bump commit local |
| `--push-remote` | тАФ | тАФ | Remote to push to (default: origin) |
| `--push-dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Create the tag + bump commit locally but only print (not run) the git push commands --push would use; pass --dry-run to also preview tagging |
| `--changelog` | тАФ | тАФ | Refresh CHANGELOG.md as part of this tag (requires a `changelog:` config block) |


### `anodizer tag rollback`

Rollback anodize-managed tags at a SHA, then revert (or reset past) the bump commit they point at


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<sha>` | тАФ | тАФ | Commit SHA to roll back from. Defaults to HEAD. |
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Print what would happen without mutating anything |
| `--no-push` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip remote tag delete and branch push (local-only) |
| `--force` | тАФ | тАФ | Override the published-state guard: roll back even when the tag's run summary shows a one-way-door publisher (crates.io, chocolatey, winget, snapcraft, ...) accepted the version, or тАФ when no summary exists тАФ when a published (non-draft) GitHub release exists for the tag. Without it, rollback refuses because those registries never accept the same version twice: the version is burned and the only clean recovery is fixing forward |
| `--scope` | тАФ | `all` | Tag-shape filter: all | lockstep | per-crate |
| `--mode` | тАФ | `revert` | Rollback strategy: revert (default; history-preserving) | reset (opt-in; rewrites history, requires --force-with-lease to push) |
| `--branch` | тАФ | тАФ | Branch name to push the revert commit to. Required when HEAD is detached and no local branch points at it (typical CI tag-push context, where GITHUB_REF_NAME is the tag тАФ not the bump-commit branch). Pass --branch master (or whichever branch the bump commit was created on). |


### `anodizer continue`

Resume a release after a transient failure or after `--prepare`/`--split`


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--merge` | тАФ | тАФ | Merge artifacts from split build jobs and run post-build stages |
| `--dist` | тАФ | тАФ | Custom dist directory (overrides config) |
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--skip` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip stages (comma-separated, e.g. docker,announce) |
| `--token` | тАФ | тАФ | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |


### `anodizer publish`

Run only the publish stages (release, publish, blob) from a completed dist/


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--token` | тАФ | тАФ | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |
| `--dist` | тАФ | тАФ | Custom dist directory (overrides config) |
| `--merge` | тАФ | тАФ | Merge artifacts from `release --split` workers (dist/<subdir>/context.json) before running the publish-only pipeline. Mirrors `goreleaser publish --merge`. |
| `--allow-rerun` | тАФ | тАФ | Force re-publish even when a prior report.json exists. WARNING: PR-based publishers will open duplicate pull requests. |


### `anodizer bump`

Bump crate versions (Conventional Commits тЖТ semver level)


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<level_or_version>` | тАФ | тАФ | patch | minor | major | <version> | release (omit to infer) |
| `--package` | `-p` | тАФ | Bump a specific crate (repeatable) |
| `--workspace` | тАФ | тАФ | Bump every workspace member (excluding publish=false) |
| `--exclude` | тАФ | тАФ | Exclude a crate from --workspace (repeatable) |
| `--pre` | тАФ | тАФ | Append a prerelease identifier (e.g. rc.1) |
| `--exact` | тАФ | тАФ | Do not rewrite dependents' [dependencies] version specs |
| `--allow-dirty` | тАФ | тАФ | Proceed even if the working tree has uncommitted changes |
| `--yes` | `-y` | тАФ | Skip confirmation prompt |
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Print the plan without editing any files |
| `--commit` | тАФ | тАФ | Stage edits and create a single commit |
| `--changelog` | тАФ | тАФ | Refresh CHANGELOG.md in the bump commit (requires --commit and a `changelog:` config block) |
| `--sign` | тАФ | тАФ | GPG-sign the commit (requires --commit) |
| `--commit-message` | тАФ | тАФ | Override the default commit message template |
| `--output` | тАФ | `text` | Output format: text | json (json requires --dry-run) |


### `anodizer announce`

Run only the announce stage from a completed dist/


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--dist` | тАФ | тАФ | Custom dist directory (overrides config) |
| `--token` | тАФ | тАФ | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |
| `--skip` | тАФ | тАФ | Skip stages (comma-separated) |
| `--merge` | тАФ | тАФ | Merge artifact lists from `release --split` workers (dist/<subdir>/context.json) before announcing. Mirrors `goreleaser announce --merge`. |


### `anodizer notify`

Send a notification through configured announce integrations


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<message>` | тАФ | тАФ | Message template to send. Supports standard Tera template vars (e.g. `{{ ProjectName }}`, `{{ Tag }}`, `{{ Version }}`) |
| `--publishers` | тАФ | тАФ | Comma-separated list of integration names to fire (default: all). Valid names: discord, discourse, slack, webhook, telegram, teams, mattermost, reddit, twitter, mastodon, bluesky, linkedin |
| `--skip` | тАФ | тАФ | Comma-separated list of integration names to omit |
| `--dry-run` | тАФ | тАФ | Run without sending (dry-run mode) |
